text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O seizes victory at the CBC Sho,
breezing her way through the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Experiencing the results of her training in action,
she challenges a long-awaited race... the Centaur
Stakes!
